narrative_text: Deep in the Glowing Grove, a curious red fox named Flicker has discovered a floating, ancient map. It seems to be leading him toward the Great Silver Oak, but he needs to figure out which path to take before the sun sets!
branch_summary: Help Flicker the Fox decode a magical floating map in the heart of a glowing forest.
scene_description: A mystical forest clearing at twilight, where the air is filled with a soft purple haze and floating amber fireflies. The ground is covered in luminous teal moss and scattered with oversized, bioluminescent mushrooms. In the center, a majestic oak tree with silver bark and translucent leaves dominates the background, bathed in the golden-hour light of a setting sun.

properties.color: vibrant burnt orange with creamy white chest and black-tipped paws
properties.size: medium, roughly the height of a small bush
properties.texture: thick, velvety fur with a very bushy, white-tipped tail
properties.pattern: solid orange with distinct white 'socks' on front legs
properties.distinctive_features: large, alert ears with tufts of fur at the tips and bright golden eyes

entities.pose: sitting back on haunches, one front paw slightly raised, head tilted to the side with ears perked forward

properties.color: aged parchment yellow with shimmering gold ink
properties.texture: crinkled, dry paper with tattered, burnt-looking edges
properties.pattern: intricate swirling lines and tiny compass symbols
properties.distinctive_features: surrounded by a faint, pulsing blue aura and floating weightlessly

entities.pose: hovering mid-air, partially unrolled, slanted at a 45-degree angle

properties.color: shimmering silver bark with pale lavender leaves
properties.size: large, towering over the other elements
properties.texture: rough, metallic-looking bark with deep twisting grooves
properties.pattern: veined leaf patterns that glow faintly in the dark
properties.distinctive_features: massive gnarled roots that snake across the ground and glowing sap dripping from a knobby branch

entities.pose: standing tall with wide, sweeping branches reaching toward the upper corners of the frame

properties.color: neon turquoise caps with white speckled dots
properties.size: small, about the size of the fox's paw
properties.texture: rubbery and smooth with a slight damp sheen
properties.distinctive_features: a cluster of three distinct stalks sharing a single mossy base

entities.pose: sprouting vertically from the ground, with the largest cap tilting slightly toward the left

error_exclusions.reason: The map is magically floating and weightless.
The tree is a static environment element.
